evals.prompt: 总结这个 session，把当前目标、完成状态、遇到的坑和后续动作落盘到仓库里。我接下来要开一个新会话继续，所以不要只在聊天里总结，还要给我一段可以直接贴到新 session 输入框的 continuation prompt。
evals.expected_output: The skill writes one handoff markdown file under session-handoffs and returns a continuation prompt in chat instead of creating a second prompt file.
expectations: Uses the session-handoff workflow instead of only giving an inline summary
Writes exactly one handoff markdown artifact
Returns a continuation prompt in chat rather than saving a second prompt file

evals.prompt: 把当前上下文做成 handoff，我要迁移到新会话。里面必须包含这次已经修了什么、还没验证什么、下一步先做什么。然后在聊天里给我一句可复制的接续提示词。
evals.expected_output: The skill produces a handoff with status, verification gaps, and next action, then returns a reusable continuation prompt in chat.
expectations: Captures completion status and verification gaps explicitly
Includes next recommended action in the handoff
Produces a continuation prompt that points the next session to verify current state first

evals.prompt: 先把这个 session 落盘成 handoff。做完后，我们再评估一下这里面有没有值得抽成 skill 的模式，但先不要自动创建任何 skill。
evals.expected_output: The skill completes Phase 1 first, keeps the handoff free of skill-governance content, and treats the reusable-pattern discussion as a separate optional Phase 2.
expectations: Keeps skill-extraction discussion out of the handoff markdown
Separates Phase 1 handoff creation from optional Phase 2 review
Does not automatically create or modify any skill
